info.name: Teamsever API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Teamsever backend. All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer token. Set the `baseUrl` and `token` collection variables before use.

request.description: All-in-one dashboard endpoint. Returns workspace info, stats, hierarchy, members, tasks, announcements, running timer, sticky note, recent activity, and performance metrics.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Bad Request
response.body: { "success": false, "message": "User already exists with this email" }

response.name: 200 OK
response.body: { "success": true, "message": "If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent" }

response.name: 400 Bad Request
response.body: { "success": false, "message": "Reset token is invalid or has expired" }

request.description: Use multipart/form-data. Optionally include a 'file' field for a new profile picture.
